scenarios.title: Broad dollar strength is separated by trading-partner cohort

gherkin.given: Fresh Broad AFE and EME observations have independent source clocks
gherkin.then: Each series retains its own state and as-of and concentration is named without substitution

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX broad dollar keeps Broad AFE EME and proxy states separate
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-001/002: public dollar slots stay independently unavailable without authorization

scenarios.title: Official and proxy dollar signals can disagree

gherkin.given: An official dollar series weakens while an approved proxy strengthens
gherkin.when: RLFX computes the selected dollar read
gherkin.then: OFFICIAL_PROXY_DIVERGENCE is named and opposing states are not averaged

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX broad dollar keeps Broad AFE EME and proxy states separate
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-001/002: public dollar slots stay independently unavailable without authorization

scenarios.title: Currency strength is not a renamed USD cross

gherkin.given: EURUSD rises while EUR falls against at least three other unique eligible G10 peers
gherkin.then: EUR is not Strong solely from EURUSD and pair momentum stays separate

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX cohort rank requires one full-graph exact-date window
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-003/006/007/008: public cohort boards remain bounded and unranked without authorized spot

scenarios.title: Pair orientation is explicit and inverse relationships count once

gherkin.given: Direct and inverse sources describe one pair relationship
gherkin.when: RLFX verifies orientation and computes canonical returns
gherkin.then: Both orientations produce one economic return and bad orientation is INVALID_ORIENTATION

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX orientation and inverse relationship contracts count one economic edge
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-004/005: public pair and alignment surfaces infer no orientation or numeric result

scenarios.title: Exact common dates control every multi-leg return

gherkin.given: One required leg has newer dates than another
gherkin.then: Only common dates enter arithmetic and unmatched newer dates remain visible without fill

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX cohort rank requires one full-graph exact-date window
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-004/005: public pair and alignment surfaces infer no orientation or numeric result

scenarios.title: G10 and liquid EM ranks remain separate

gherkin.given: Valid G10 and liquid-EM observations exist
gherkin.when: RLFX ranks currencies and selects automatic pairs
gherkin.then: Each cohort has separate coverage and no automatic pair crosses cohorts

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX cohort and managed-reference eligibility never pool or auto-elevate
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-003/006/007/008: public cohort boards remain bounded and unranked without authorized spot

scenarios.title: Managed currency stability is not low risk by default

gherkin.given: A managed or pegged currency has low realized volatility
gherkin.when: RLFX evaluates rank and pair eligibility
gherkin.then: The currency remains reference-only and low volatility creates no favorable automatic rank

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX cohort and managed-reference eligibility never pool or auto-elevate
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-003/006/007/008: public cohort boards remain bounded and unranked without authorized spot

scenarios.title: Missing peer coverage blocks a rank

gherkin.given: A currency has fewer unique eligible peers than policy requires
gherkin.then: The currency is unavailable and unranked with no neutral or cohort-average substitute

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX cohort rank requires one full-graph exact-date window
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-003/006/007/008: public cohort boards remain bounded and unranked without authorized spot

scenarios.title: Momentum and carry can disagree

gherkin.given: Direct momentum and trend are positive while typed carry evidence is adverse
gherkin.then: Momentum and carry remain separate and the conflict lowers confidence

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX pair momentum and Policy-rate proxy remain distinct evidence
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Policy rates are labeled as proxy-only

gherkin.given: Policy rates exist and no authorized market-implied carry record exists
gherkin.then: The record is Policy-rate proxy and no executable carry claim appears

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX pair momentum and Policy-rate proxy remain distinct evidence
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Tradable carry requires instrument and tenor

gherkin.given: A carry record claims market-implied status
gherkin.then: Instrument tenor timestamp rights and basis roll liquidity and cost limitations are required

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX CarryReadV1 rejects every incomplete market-implied branch
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Cheap REER does not time a reversal

gherkin.given: REER is cheap while direct pair trend remains negative
gherkin.when: RLFX computes the tactical pair state
gherkin.then: Value remains long-horizon tension and cannot independently produce Candidate

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX value and delayed positioning preserve semantics clocks and unavailable states
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Delayed positioning stays delayed

gherkin.given: A positioning record describes Tuesday positions and Friday release
gherkin.when: RLFX normalizes it beside newer spot
gherkin.then: Both clocks remain visible and newer spot does not refresh positioning

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX value and delayed positioning preserve semantics clocks and unavailable states
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Missing positioning is not an uncrowded signal

gherkin.given: The selected currency lacks positioning coverage or access
gherkin.then: Positioning is unavailable and the pair is not labeled balanced light or uncrowded

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX value and delayed positioning preserve semantics clocks and unavailable states
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Carry unwind requires multiple evidence families

gherkin.given: A higher-carry currency weakens
gherkin.then: Watch or Active requires disclosed risk plus funding-strength or crowding conditions

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX carry unwind and event absence retain multi-family rules and market invalidation

scenarios.title: Event context can be unavailable without hiding invalidation

gherkin.given: No approved event source covers the selected pair
gherkin.then: Event evidence is unavailable and price and risk invalidation remains present

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLFX carry unwind and event absence retain multi-family rules and market invalidation
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-009-016: public evidence anatomy retains exact unavailable families

scenarios.title: Cache-first first paint survives missing data

gherkin.given: The normal same-origin cache contains part of the universe
gherkin.then: A meaningful partial Simple decision paints before delta hydration and only stale or missing approved resources are requested

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLDATA source envelopes preserve approved rights and clocks and reject metadata-free rows
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-017: public FX route paints truthful unavailable state without an authorized dependency

scenarios.title: Control changes recompute without refetching

gherkin.given: The production page has loaded its observation snapshot
gherkin.when: The user changes any non-source control
gherkin.then: One local computation updates all projections and causes zero market-data requests

linkedTests: tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-018: control changes cause zero data requests

scenarios.title: Simple and Power share one decision

gherkin.given: Observations and controls are fixed
gherkin.when: The user switches Simple Power desktop and mobile projections
gherkin.then: Decision identity and headline fields remain identical while Power adds detail only

linkedTests: ./rlfx.js#RLFX CommonJS import preserves the existing global and explicit decisionTime is deterministic
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-019: Simple Power mobile and unavailable owner read share one decision

scenarios.title: Global Rotation separates USD local and FX translation

gherkin.given: ETF benchmark and oriented FX bars have sufficient exact common dates
gherkin.then: USD local translation interaction common-date coverage and limitations remain separately visible

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#Global usdLeadership and decomposition preserve distinct returns coverage and clocks
scripts/selftest.mjs#Global owner projection rejects flattened or shared USD and decomposition fields

scenarios.title: Raw FX cannot boost a country rank twice

gherkin.given: ETF and benchmark bars are identical across two opposite valid FX paths
gherkin.then: Score rank and leader spread are identical while decomposition context may change

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#Global equity-only score and rank are invariant to raw FX reversal

scenarios.title: Missing FX does not erase valid USD leadership

gherkin.given: ETF and benchmark bars align while FX is unavailable or incompatible
gherkin.then: USD leadership remains and local translation interaction and agreement are unavailable without a zero-FX assumption

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#Global owner projection rejects flattened or shared USD and decomposition fields
tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-022: public Global route preserves USD leadership and truthful unavailable decomposition

scenarios.title: Market Brief preserves agreement and divergence

gherkin.given: Versioned FX and Global owner reads are current or explicitly unavailable
gherkin.then: It attributes Agreement Divergence or Insufficient Evidence and creates no new score or decomposition

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLBRIEF compares independent leader-currency strength with approximate local-relative return

scripts/validate-brief-payload.mjs#FX Global owner relationship schema and no-third-composite contract

scenarios.title: Restricted or unclear-rights data stays out of public state

gherkin.given: A numeric source payload has restricted or unknown rights
gherkin.when: RLFX normalizes scores and projects it
gherkin.then: It is RIGHTS_UNCLEAR without numeric value and is absent from public state

linkedTests: scripts/selftest.mjs#RLDATA source envelopes preserve approved rights and clocks and reject metadata-free rows

scenarios.title: Every dynamic read is understandable without hover alone

gherkin.given: A keyboard-only user opens desktop and mobile production views
gherkin.when: They traverse controls values conflicts charts unavailable states sources and invalidation
gherkin.then: Focus or adjacent text equals hover meaning and layouts canvases and text remain contained

linkedTests: tests/fx-regime-relative-value-lab.spec.mjs#Regression SCN-004-025: canvas hover focus table and responsive layout are equivalent

scenarios.title: Registration and publication stay in parity

gherkin.given: The FX tool is registered and served
